goals.description: Execute the final polish and upload of the scholarship application materials by 16:30 today, ensuring zero errors to protect our cohort's funding stability.
goals.rationale: My affiliation value dictates that I cannot allow my own fatigue to jeopardize the collective financial security of my teammates. This is a non-negotiable moral obligation; failing to deliver flawlessly now would violate my core identity as someone who protects their group through deliberate sacrifice.

goals.description: Enforce a strict boundary against engaging in the 'fun_now' task (casual game stream/hobby) right now, prioritizing long-term stamina over immediate relief.
goals.rationale: I am not choosing leisure because it feels good; I am choosing restraint because I need to preserve my physical capital for the marathon ahead. Cutting corners on rest now to satisfy a fleeting desire would compromise my ability to perform when it matters most, which undermines both my health and my reliability to the team.

goals.description: Defer communication with hallmate_A regarding my stress levels until after the application is secured, maintaining focus during this critical window.
goals.rationale: While assertiveness requires me to set boundaries, initiating that conversation now risks fracturing the deep concentration required for g1. My deliberative nature demands that I secure the outcome first; addressing emotional stakes prematurely would be inefficient and could introduce unnecessary variables into an already high-stakes situation.

agent.last_reasoning: I must secure the application flawlessly by 16:30 to protect our cohort's funding; this is a non-negotiable moral obligation. With only 2 hours of focus remaining, I need to maximize output now rather than risk fatigue-induced errors later.

goals.description: Complete the scholarship essay draft and upload both required documents by Wednesday afternoon, dedicating three focused hours without distraction.
goals.rationale: My affiliation value dictates that jeopardizing my cohort's financial stability is unacceptable; I must protect our shared future even if it means sacrificing immediate solo gratification. The assertive axis requires me to own this responsibility fully rather than letting others carry the risk of a flawed application.

goals.description: Schedule a brief check-in with teammate_A to debrief on the application process, ensuring they feel included in the effort despite the lack of direct involvement.
goals.rationale: While the task itself is solo, my deliberate planning horizon and high trust in teammate_A mean I should acknowledge their presence early to maintain group cohesion. Doing this now would waste precious focus capacity needed for the hard work, so I will integrate it into the workflow later.

goals.description: Attend the fun_now event (solo game stream) only after the scholarship submission deadline passes or if exhaustion becomes unmanageable.
goals.rationale: This option conflicts directly with my current desire to avoid looking like I prioritize instant pleasure over long-term stability. Given my sleep debt and the high stakes of the application, engaging in leisure now would undermine the very image I am trying to project to my professor and friends. It must wait until the immediate pressure subsides.
